stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You experience a total RNAV system failure enroute to your destination, Amsterdam Schiphol aerodrome. During descent, Schiphol Arrival assigns you the NORKU 2A arrival. Can you accept this STAR?

options.a: No, because it is an RNAV STAR.
options.b: No, because it is an RNAV STAR. However, you can request REKKEN 2A.
options.c: You can follow NORKU 2A because it is a conventional STAR.
options.d: Yes, if you given vectors to OSKUR.
